creator: mnag@FreeBSD.org
text:
If you use x11-drivers/xf86-video-i810 can you remove and add 
x11-drivers/xf86-video-intel port?

Regards

Anders Nordby wrote:
>> Number:         117220
>> Category:       ports
>> Synopsis:       Xorg 7.3 crashes wih i810 driver
>> Confidential:   no
>> Severity:       serious

>> How-To-Repeat:
> 1) Install FreeBSD 6.2-STABLE that I have (RELENG_6_2 as of october 9).
> 
> 2) Install Xorg 7.3 from ports. I have xorg-server-1.4_1,1 and xorg-drivers 7.3.
> 
> 3) Install and run xscreensaver.
> 
> 4) Wait..
> 
>> Fix:
> N/A
